valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Fri 26 Jun 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Sat 27 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low Shannon 1009 expected Bailey 997 by midday tomorrow. Highs Biscay 1019 and Fair Isle 1017 losing their identities by same time
